steps.title: Compare dates
steps.content: The passage says the Centro de Arte de las Americas was founded in 1991, while Plaza de Cultura y Artes del Suroeste opened in 2011. That gives a clear date-based contrast between the two institutions.

steps.title: Avoid missing details
steps.content: A mentions visitor numbers, B mentions collection size, and C mentions building size, but the passage does not compare the institutions on any of those points. The only stated contrast is that the Phoenix institution opened later. The answer is D.
